chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 69 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 Mr. Bakhshan Khan Mahar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Muhammad Akram Rajput, DSP (Legal) on behalf of DIG Police Sukkur and Muhammad Younis Rodnani, DSP Mirpur Mathelo and Inspector Atta Muhammad Soomro >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Assistant AG files progress reports of DIG Police Sukkur, SSP, Ghotki, DSP Mirpur Mathelo and SHO Khanpur Mahar, which are taken on record. Copy whereof is provided to learned Counsel for the Petitioner. As per their reports / statements accused Moula Bux alias Ouloo Mahar and Saeed Ahmed alias Saeedo Mahar have been granted protective bail by this Court for approaching the concerned trial Court. Since the accused persons, whose arrest has been sought by the Petitioner by way of this Petition, have been surfaced, therefore, this petition has become infructuous and is disposed of accordingly. Judge ARBROHI
